ingredients_text: Puff pastry (53%) [fortified wheat flour (WHEAT flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), water, palm oil, salt, rapeseed oil, emulsifier: mono - and diglycerides of fatty acids], filling (47%) [water, vegetarian cheese (20%) (medium mature cheddar cheese (MILK), full fat soft cheese (MILK) (contains salt), medium fat soft cheese (MILK) (contains salt), mozzarella cheese (MILK)), potato flake (11%), potato (10%), leek (10%), dried skimmed MILK, onion, salted butter (MILK), salt, white pepper].
